arts.ttl: Man City vs Plymouth: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: The Championship strugglers completed one of the great modern-day cup upsets in the fourth round as they beat runaway Premier League leaders Liverpool - albeit a heavily rotated Reds side - 1-0 at Home Park. Plymouth Argyle hope to pull off another FA Cup giant killing when they take on Manchester City at the Etihad Stadium on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: City v Plymouth programme: Echeverri exclusive and Devon memories
arts.sum: We also have the view from the commentary box from Alistair Mann and Mike Summerbee’s Buzzword as well as a look at what’s been happening elsewhere around the Etihad Campus with all the latest info, stats and big news. What’s more, fans will also be able to order a programme subscription, with three bundles opportunities available.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Pep Guardiola confirms Bernardo Silva, Ilkay Gundogan exit stance in huge triple admission
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola confirms whether he intends to keep working with experienced midfield duo Bernardo Silva and Ilkay Gundogan next year.

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Plymouth – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City welcome Championship side Plymouth Argyle to the Etihad in the fifth-round of the FA Cup this evening. The FA Cup represents Manchester City’s last realistic avenue to silverware this season. Pep Guardiola’s side are aiming to reach the final for the third successive season.
